title: Italian Cod with Harira Crust
description: A Mediterranean-inspired Italian dish featuring cod with a flavorful harira crust.
instructions: Rinse the cod fillet and pat dry with paper towels.
In a bowl, mix the harira mix, robust olive oil, salt, and moroccan spices.
Coat the cod fillet evenly with the harira mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Coat the coated cod fillet with light breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated cod fillet on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the cod is cooked through and the crust is golden brown.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
